description: Business accounts, probably. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: 11th or 12th century. Written out in full sentences. Possibly written up for the sake of a legal case? In any case, this document summarizes the commercial activities of a certain Yosef. Mentions places such as Tyre and Alexandria. Mentions goods such as copper/brass, crimson, silk, and kohl(?).
description_he: חשבונות עסקיים, כנראה; ביהודית-ערבית; המאה ה-11 או ה-12; כתוב במשפטים שלמים; מסכם את הפעילות המסחרית של יוסף; מזכיר צור ואלכסנדריה
